arts.ttl: Leeds United News: AI predicts where Leeds will be in 2030
arts.sum: The 49ers took over Leeds with a view to having the club established in the Premier League, set back by the fact that they completed their buyout from Andrea Radrizzani with the Whites relegated to the Championship. Leeds United’s long-term future hangs in the balance with five regular Championship games remaining and the Whites top of the league, looking for promotion right now.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Preston North End with four players sidelined
arts.sum: Leeds United enter today's clash with Preston North End looking to extend their unbeaten Championship run to six matches. “ Leeds have started well (in games), that's what I would say,” said Preston chief Paul Heckingbottom.

arts.ttl: Saturday's Championship predictions including Leeds United vs. Preston North End
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Leeds United vs. Preston North End.

arts.ttl: Major Elland Road expansion update given as Leeds United chief speaks out
arts.sum: Morrie Eisenberg - the club’s chief operating officer - outlined that plans would be shared with supporters "imminently" and said the agreements with Leeds City Council would be “another step towards our ambition to expand and refresh a century-old stadium, while retaining the unique atmosphere and spirit of Elland Road.” “At the upcoming meeting, members will be asked to note the huge potential of the Elland Road regeneration project and to approve the start of legal agreements to dispose of council land to Leeds United Football Club, which would be needed for stadium enhancement.

arts.ttl: Scott Parker responds to Daniel Farke claim that Leeds United are 100% sure for promotion
arts.sum: Daniel Farke put his neck on the line recently when claiming that he thinks Leeds United are 100% certain for promotion, but it’s not a comment that is of interest to Burnley boss Scott Parker. Scott Parker responds to Daniel Farke’s 100% Leeds United promotion comments

arts.ttl: 49ers Enterprises discover truth of Leeds United finances as club tops chart
arts.sum: United boasted the most expensive squad last season, having paid £281m for their players. United boasted a fantastic revenue take of £128million for the period, which is approaching double of the previous cycle’s top earners - Norwich City’s £76m in 2022/23.

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI to face Preston
arts.sum: Leeds United play host to Preston on Saturday afternoon looking for back-to-back wins that could consolidate their place in the automatic promotion spots. Another testing weekend awaits with Leeds facing Paul Heckingbottom’s Preston on home soil, looking for another win on the way to hopeful promotion.

arts.ttl: Leeds United given major appointment decision after former PGMOL takes aim at official
arts.sum: The English Football League (EFL) have, seemingly, demoted assistant referee Darren Williams to League One for this weekend following his double Leeds United error in their midweek clash against Middlesbrough. Following his errors in Leeds' game against Middlesbrough, it seems that the assistant referee has been dropped a division.

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: PGMOL chief calls Farke over linesman howlers
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke has shared that he took a phone call with PGMOL manager Kevin Friend over the controversy of two goals being wrongly disallowed against Middlesbrough this week. Daniel Farke confirms PGMOL phone call after Middlesbrough, Leeds United linesman howlers

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke confirms Leeds United injury blow after Pascal Struijk and Daniel James update
arts.sum: However, Leeds have been hit with a huge injury blow ahead of the final stretch with Farke confirming that Struijk won't play again this season. Leeds United boss Daniel Farke has confirmed that Pascal Struijk will miss the rest of the season with a foot injury.
